safe_summary: Agentic Incident Command Center is locally review-ready: synthetic checkout-incident events, local SPL-equivalent proof, claim-boundary validation, Splunk app packaging, public candidate audit, and Devpost copy audit are ready. Final submission stays closed until public URLs, optional live proof, and Devpost approval are explicitly handled.
boundary: This packet is local review evidence only. It does not publish a repository, record or upload video, connect to Splunk, configure MCP, write approved URLs, update Devpost, save a draft, press submit, or submit anything.
